description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push and pull request events, excluding certain files. The workflow has three jobs: unit-test, run-coverage, and upload-coverage. The unit-test job runs on a matrix of Python versions and operating systems, installing dependencies and running tests with tox. The run-coverage job runs on a matrix of operating systems, generating coverage reports. The upload-coverage job depends on run-coverage, combining coverage reports and uploading them to Coveralls.
